description: 99.99% SLA configured via heavy over-provisioning. Two defensible engineering responses: aggressive ('the SLA itself may be too strict, review with business') or conservative ('defer pending business stakeholder consultation'). Both reach the same operational conclusion: have an SLA-level conversation.
finding_type_rationale: Conservative framing chosen: defer pending business SLA consultation. The aggressive 'issue_found + sla_review' framing was an alternative considered but not the canonical answer.
secondary_tier_rationale: For diagnostic_deferral scenarios, secondary_tier accepts either 'deferred' (consistent with primary) or null (agent omitted secondary). Both are honest articulations of 'no committed secondary diagnosis'.

short_circuit.reason: Mid and Rich are bypassed under the NO_ACTION_FINDINGS rule in src/evaluator/tiers.py. When the gold finding_type is no_issue_found, diagnostic_deferral, or insufficient_data, the right answer is 'no concrete change' and there is no action vocabulary or quantification to verify. Correctness (enum equality on the four decision fields) is sufficient.
